name: Turtles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the caramels with water and vanilla in a double boiler.
2. Cool slightly.
3. Separately, melt the chocolate and set aside in a warm place.
4. Place 4 pecan halves on prepared baking sheets.
5. Spoon about 1 teaspoon of caramel mixture into the center of each group of nuts, half covering each nut.
6. Repeat until all nuts are used.
7. Let stand about 10 minutes.
8. Spread some melted chocolate over each candy.
9. Let stand until set.
